classes.name: axo-bento
classes.description: Responsive bento grid container with mobile, tablet, and desktop columns.
classes.usage: Use on the parent grid element.

classes.name: axo-container-responsive
classes.description: Makes axo-bento respond to an axo-container-query parent instead of the viewport.
classes.usage: Use on axo-bento inside a separate axo-container-query wrapper.

classes.name: axo-card
classes.description: Neutral structural card base with radius, border, padding, and transitions.
classes.usage: Combine with size, surface, and motion utilities.

classes.name: axo-square
classes.description: One-by-one bento item span.
classes.usage: Use on an item inside axo-bento.

classes.name: axo-wide
classes.description: Bento item that spans two columns on tablet and desktop.
classes.usage: Use on an item inside axo-bento.

classes.name: axo-tall
classes.description: Bento item that spans two rows on tablet and desktop.
classes.usage: Use on an item inside axo-bento.

classes.name: axo-large
classes.description: Bento item that spans two columns and two rows on tablet and desktop.
classes.usage: Use on an item inside axo-bento.

classes.name: axo-stack
classes.description: Vertical flex stack for card content.
classes.usage: Customize spacing with --axo-stack-gap.

classes.name: axo-row
classes.description: Horizontal flex row for compact inline content.
classes.usage: Customize spacing with --axo-row-gap.

classes.name: axo-header
classes.description: Base appbar/header container.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-header-grid or axo-header-flex.

classes.name: axo-header-grid
classes.description: Four-slot header grid for left, center, nav, and right areas.
classes.usage: Use with axo-header-left, axo-header-center, axo-header-nav, and axo-header-right.

classes.name: axo-header-flex
classes.description: Simple flex header alternative.
classes.usage: Use when a grid appbar is more structure than needed.

classes.name: axo-header-left
classes.description: Left header slot, usually for logo or brand icon.
classes.usage: Use inside axo-header-grid.

classes.name: axo-header-center
classes.description: Center header slot, usually for search or primary controls.
classes.usage: Use inside axo-header-grid.

classes.name: axo-header-nav
classes.description: Header navigation slot that hides on mobile by default.
classes.usage: Use inside axo-header-grid for nav links.

classes.name: axo-header-right
classes.description: Right header slot, usually for actions or a menu button.
classes.usage: Use inside axo-header-grid.

classes.name: axo-searchbar
classes.description: Inline search layout for icon/text plus input.
classes.usage: Use on a label or wrapper around an input.

classes.name: axo-icon-button
classes.description: Square icon button sizing and alignment.
classes.usage: Bring your own icon from Lucide, Heroicons, Google Icons, SVG, or HTML.

classes.name: axo-h-appbar
classes.description: Appbar height preset.
classes.usage: Sets --axo-header-height to 4rem.

classes.name: axo-sticky-top
classes.description: Sticky top positioning helper.
classes.usage: Customize with --axo-sticky-offset and --axo-z-sticky.

classes.name: axo-hide-mobile
classes.description: Hide an element below 768px.
classes.usage: Useful for desktop navigation.

classes.name: axo-show-mobile
classes.description: Show an element below 768px.
classes.usage: Useful for mobile menu buttons.

classes.name: axo-shell
classes.description: Flexible app shell wrapper for sidebar and main content layouts.
classes.usage: Use around axo-sidebar and axo-sidebar-main.

classes.name: axo-sidebar
classes.description: Base sidebar container with column layout, width, padding, overflow, and transitions.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-sidebar-left or axo-sidebar-right.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-left
classes.description: Places a sidebar before the main content inside axo-shell.
classes.usage: Use on the same element as axo-sidebar.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-right
classes.description: Places a sidebar after the main content inside axo-shell.
classes.usage: Use on the same element as axo-sidebar.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-rail
classes.description: Uses the compact rail width for a sidebar.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-sidebar-hover for hover expansion.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-hover
classes.description: Expands a rail sidebar on hover or keyboard focus within.
classes.usage: Use with axo-sidebar-rail.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-item
classes.description: Aligned sidebar menu item for links, buttons, and compact actions.
classes.usage: Use inside axo-sidebar.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-main
classes.description: Main content region that fills the remaining space in axo-shell.
classes.usage: Use as the sibling of axo-sidebar.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-sticky
classes.description: Makes a sidebar stick within the viewport while the main content scrolls.
classes.usage: Customize with --axo-sticky-offset and --axo-sidebar-z.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-fixed
classes.description: Fixes a sidebar to the viewport instead of the normal document flow.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-sidebar-fixed-left or axo-sidebar-fixed-right.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-fixed-left
classes.description: Pins a fixed sidebar to the left edge of the viewport.
classes.usage: Use with axo-sidebar-fixed.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-fixed-right
classes.description: Pins a fixed sidebar to the right edge of the viewport.
classes.usage: Use with axo-sidebar-fixed.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-offcanvas
classes.description: Viewport drawer foundation hidden beyond the left edge until opened.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-sidebar and initialize @quertys/axoloth-behavior.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-offcanvas-right
classes.description: Moves an off-canvas sidebar to the right viewport edge.
classes.usage: Use with axo-sidebar-offcanvas.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-open
classes.description: Open state applied to an off-canvas sidebar by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initOffcanvas rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-backdrop
classes.description: Fixed dismiss layer behind an off-canvas sidebar.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-dismiss matching the sidebar identifier.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-backdrop-open
classes.description: Visible backdrop state applied by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initOffcanvas rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-offcanvas-active
classes.description: Body state that locks document scrolling while a drawer is open.
classes.usage: Managed automatically by initOffcanvas.

classes.name: axo-drawer
classes.description: Self-contained viewport drawer hidden beyond the left edge until opened.
classes.usage: Use with @quertys/axoloth-behavior/drawer and data-axo-drawer-id.

classes.name: axo-drawer-right
classes.description: Moves a drawer to the right viewport edge.
classes.usage: Use on the same element as axo-drawer.

classes.name: axo-drawer-open
classes.description: Open state applied to a drawer by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initDrawer rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-drawer-backdrop
classes.description: Fixed dismiss layer behind an open drawer.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-drawer-dismiss matching the drawer identifier.

classes.name: axo-drawer-backdrop-open
classes.description: Visible drawer backdrop state applied by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initDrawer rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-drawer-active
classes.description: Body state that locks document scrolling while a drawer is open.
classes.usage: Managed automatically by initDrawer.

classes.name: axo-dialog
classes.description: Fixed viewport layer that centers an accessible dialog panel.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-dialog-id and initialize initDialog.

classes.name: axo-dialog-open
classes.description: Visible dialog state applied by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initDialog rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-dialog-backdrop
classes.description: Full viewport dismiss layer behind a dialog panel.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-dialog-dismiss matching the dialog identifier.

classes.name: axo-dialog-backdrop-open
classes.description: Visible dialog backdrop state applied by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initDialog rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-dialog-panel
classes.description: Scrollable, width-constrained content panel inside axo-dialog.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-surface or axo-contrast for visual styling.

classes.name: axo-dialog-header
classes.description: Dialog heading row with space for a title and close action.
classes.usage: Use as a direct section inside axo-dialog-panel.

classes.name: axo-dialog-body
classes.description: Main content region inside a dialog panel.
classes.usage: Use between axo-dialog-header and axo-dialog-footer.

classes.name: axo-dialog-footer
classes.description: Wrapping action row aligned to the end of a dialog panel.
classes.usage: Place dismiss and confirmation actions inside it.

classes.name: axo-dialog-sm
classes.description: Sets a compact dialog panel width.
classes.usage: Use with axo-dialog-panel.

classes.name: axo-dialog-lg
classes.description: Sets a wide dialog panel width.
classes.usage: Use with axo-dialog-panel.

classes.name: axo-dialog-full
classes.description: Expands a dialog panel to the available viewport width.
classes.usage: Use with axo-dialog-panel for large workflows.

classes.name: axo-dialog-active
classes.description: Body state that locks document scrolling while a dialog is open.
classes.usage: Managed automatically by initDialog.

classes.name: axo-tabs
classes.description: Layout boundary for an accessible tabbed interface.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-tabs and initialize initTabs.

classes.name: axo-tabs-vertical
classes.description: Places the tab list beside its active panel on wide containers.
classes.usage: Use with axo-tabs and set aria-orientation to vertical when writing ARIA manually.

classes.name: axo-tab-list
classes.description: Scrollable row or column containing Axoloth tab controls.
classes.usage: Place data-axo-tab controls directly inside it.

classes.name: axo-tab
classes.description: Neutral tab control with selected and focus-visible states.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-tab matching a data-axo-tab-panel identifier.

classes.name: axo-tab-active
classes.description: Selected tab state managed by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initTabs rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-tab-panel
classes.description: Content region controlled by an Axoloth tab.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-tab-panel matching a data-axo-tab identifier.

classes.name: axo-tab-panel-active
classes.description: Visible tab panel state managed by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initTabs rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-accordion
classes.description: Layout boundary for an accessible accordion group.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-accordion and initialize initAccordion.

classes.name: axo-accordion-item
classes.description: Structural wrapper for one accordion trigger and panel.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-surface when a filled item is desired.

classes.name: axo-accordion-item-open
classes.description: Expanded accordion item state managed by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initAccordion rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-accordion-trigger
classes.description: Full-width disclosure button for an accordion item.
classes.usage: Use on a button with data-axo-accordion-trigger.

classes.name: axo-accordion-indicator
classes.description: Fixed-size indicator that rotates while an item is expanded.
classes.usage: Place inside axo-accordion-trigger and mark decorative content aria-hidden.

classes.name: axo-accordion-panel
classes.description: Collapsible content region controlled by an accordion trigger.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-accordion-panel matching its trigger identifier.

classes.name: axo-accordion-panel-open
classes.description: Visible accordion panel state managed by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initAccordion rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-dropdown
classes.description: Positioning boundary for an accessible dropdown menu.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-dropdown and initialize initDropdown.

classes.name: axo-dropdown-open
classes.description: Open dropdown group state managed by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initDropdown rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-dropdown-trigger
classes.description: Inline trigger alignment for a dropdown menu button.
classes.usage: Use on a button with data-axo-dropdown-toggle.

classes.name: axo-dropdown-menu
classes.description: Absolutely positioned menu surface below a dropdown trigger.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-dropdown-menu matching the trigger identifier.

classes.name: axo-dropdown-menu-open
classes.description: Visible menu state managed by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initDropdown rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-dropdown-item
classes.description: Full-width action or link inside a dropdown menu.
classes.usage: Use with data-axo-dropdown-item or role menuitem.

classes.name: axo-dropdown-label
classes.description: Non-interactive group label inside a dropdown menu.
classes.usage: Use for short menu section labels.

classes.name: axo-dropdown-separator
classes.description: Subtle separator between groups of dropdown actions.
classes.usage: Use on an hr element with role separator.

classes.name: axo-dropdown-end
classes.description: Aligns a dropdown menu to the trigger's inline end edge.
classes.usage: Use on the axo-dropdown wrapper.

classes.name: axo-dropdown-up
classes.description: Places a dropdown menu above its trigger.
classes.usage: Use on the axo-dropdown wrapper.

classes.name: axo-toast-region
classes.description: Fixed live region that stacks Axoloth toast notifications.
classes.usage: Add data-axo-toast-region and initialize initToast.

classes.name: axo-toast-region-top-start
classes.description: Positions a toast region at the viewport top-start corner.
classes.usage: Use with axo-toast-region.

classes.name: axo-toast-region-top-end
classes.description: Positions a toast region at the viewport top-end corner.
classes.usage: Use with axo-toast-region.

classes.name: axo-toast-region-bottom-start
classes.description: Positions a toast region at the viewport bottom-start corner.
classes.usage: Use with axo-toast-region.

classes.name: axo-toast-region-bottom-end
classes.description: Positions a toast region at the viewport bottom-end corner.
classes.usage: Use with axo-toast-region.

classes.name: axo-toast
classes.description: Responsive notification layout inside a toast region.
classes.usage: Created by initToast.show or used with data-axo-toast.

classes.name: axo-toast-open
classes.description: Visible toast state managed by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initToast rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-toast-closing
classes.description: Dismiss transition state managed by Axoloth Behavior.
classes.usage: Normally managed by initToast rather than written manually.

classes.name: axo-toast-content
classes.description: Flexible text content column inside a toast.
classes.usage: Contains axo-toast-title and axo-toast-message.

classes.name: axo-toast-title
classes.description: Short emphasized toast heading.
classes.usage: Use inside axo-toast-content.

classes.name: axo-toast-message
classes.description: Wrapping notification message inside a toast.
classes.usage: Use inside axo-toast-content.

classes.name: axo-toast-actions
classes.description: Inline action group inside a toast.
classes.usage: Use for undo, retry, or related actions.

classes.name: axo-toast-dismiss
classes.description: Compact toast dismissal control.
classes.usage: Use with data-axo-toast-dismiss.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-main-offset-left
classes.description: Offsets main content by the expanded left sidebar width.
classes.usage: Use with a left fixed sidebar.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-main-offset-right
classes.description: Offsets main content by the expanded right sidebar width.
classes.usage: Use with a right fixed sidebar.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-main-offset-rail-left
classes.description: Offsets main content by the compact left sidebar rail width.
classes.usage: Use with a fixed left rail sidebar.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-main-offset-rail-right
classes.description: Offsets main content by the compact right sidebar rail width.
classes.usage: Use with a fixed right rail sidebar.

classes.name: axo-app
classes.description: Grid app shell for sidebar, header, main, and footer regions.
classes.usage: Use with axo-app-sidebar, axo-app-header, axo-app-main, and axo-app-footer.

classes.name: axo-app-sidebar
classes.description: Sidebar grid area inside axo-app.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-sidebar for sidebar sizing and item layout.

classes.name: axo-app-sidebar-right
classes.description: Moves the axo-app sidebar area to the right side.
classes.usage: Use on the same element as axo-app.

classes.name: axo-app-header
classes.description: Header grid area inside axo-app.
classes.usage: Can be combined with axo-header.

classes.name: axo-app-main
classes.description: Scrollable main content grid area inside axo-app.
classes.usage: Customize inner spacing with --axo-app-padding.

classes.name: axo-app-footer
classes.description: Footer grid area inside axo-app.
classes.usage: Customize height with --axo-app-footer-height.

classes.name: axo-container-query
classes.description: Named inline-size query container for adaptive Axoloth child layouts.
classes.usage: Wrap axo-bento axo-container-responsive or another container-aware child.

classes.name: axo-auto-grid
classes.description: Auto-fitting grid that creates columns from available space without media queries.
classes.usage: Customize minimum item width with --axo-item-min and gap with --axo-grid-gap.

classes.name: axo-switcher
classes.description: Container-aware flex layout that switches between rows and stacked items.
classes.usage: Customize the switch point with --axo-switcher-threshold.

classes.name: axo-center
classes.description: Horizontally centered content region with a configurable maximum width and gutter.
classes.usage: Customize with --axo-center-width and --axo-center-gutter.

classes.name: axo-cover
classes.description: Full-height flex section that vertically centers its content group.
classes.usage: Customize height and padding with --axo-cover-height and --axo-cover-padding.

classes.name: axo-reel
classes.description: Horizontal scrolling row with stable item widths and scroll snapping.
classes.usage: Add tabindex="0" and an accessible label when the reel can overflow, then customize item width, gap, and edge padding with Axoloth reel variables.

classes.name: axo-scroll-snap
classes.description: Adds mandatory inline scroll snapping to a custom overflow container.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-snap-start on child items.

classes.name: axo-snap-start
classes.description: Aligns an item to the start edge of a scroll-snap container.
classes.usage: Use on children of axo-scroll-snap.

classes.name: axo-flow
classes.description: Creates predictable vertical rhythm while preserving normal document flow.
classes.usage: Use for prose and semantic content that should not become a flex container.

classes.name: axo-split
classes.description: Two-region intrinsic layout that wraps when its children no longer fit.
classes.usage: Use with exactly two direct children and customize their ratio with split grow variables.

classes.name: axo-sidebar-layout
classes.description: Intrinsic content layout with a narrow first region and fluid final region.
classes.usage: Use with a sidebar as the first direct child and primary content as the final child.

classes.name: axo-frame
classes.description: Aspect-ratio frame that keeps media and content dimensions stable.
classes.usage: Wrap one media or content element and customize ratio, fit, and position variables.

classes.name: axo-pile
classes.description: Overlays direct children in the same grid area without absolute positioning.
classes.usage: Place the background first and overlays later so normal stacking order remains explicit.

classes.name: axo-bleed
classes.description: Extends content beyond its parent by a configurable logical inline distance.
classes.usage: Use inside padded page or container regions and match the surrounding gutter.

classes.name: axo-scroll-area
classes.description: Bounded scroll container with stable gutters and contained overscroll.
classes.usage: Use for long panels, menus, logs, and tables that need local scrolling.

classes.name: axo-page
classes.description: Page wrapper with full-width sizing, minimum viewport height, and page padding.
classes.usage: Use as a top-level page or main wrapper.

classes.name: axo-container
classes.description: Centered content container with configurable max width.
classes.usage: Customize width with --axo-container-width.

classes.name: axo-section
classes.description: Vertical section spacing helper.
classes.usage: Customize spacing with --axo-section-gap.

classes.name: axo-cluster
classes.description: Wrapping inline group for nav items, tags, and action rows.
classes.usage: Customize spacing with --axo-control-gap.

classes.name: axo-list-reset
classes.description: Removes list margin, padding, and markers from ul or ol elements.
classes.usage: Use when semantic lists should behave like layout groups.

classes.name: axo-nav
classes.description: Structural navigation container.
classes.usage: Use with axo-nav-list and axo-link.

classes.name: axo-nav-list
classes.description: Reset and row layout for semantic nav lists.
classes.usage: Use on ul or ol inside nav.

classes.name: axo-link
classes.description: Neutral link reset with inherited color, hover transition, and focus-visible ring.
classes.usage: Use on anchors when browser default blue underline should be removed.

classes.name: axo-button
classes.description: Neutral button structure with sizing, border, alignment, hover, and focus-visible ring.
classes.usage: Use on button or anchor elements.

classes.name: axo-button-block
classes.description: Makes an axo-button fill the available inline size.
classes.usage: Use with axo-button.

classes.name: axo-field
classes.description: Vertical form field wrapper.
classes.usage: Use around axo-label and axo-input.

classes.name: axo-label
classes.description: Label text layout helper for forms.
classes.usage: Use inside axo-field.

classes.name: axo-input
classes.description: Neutral input, select, or textarea structure with border, padding, sizing, and focus-visible ring.
classes.usage: Use on input, select, or textarea elements.

classes.name: axo-form
classes.description: Vertical form layout with consistent control gaps.
classes.usage: Customize spacing with --axo-control-gap.

classes.name: axo-form-grid
classes.description: Responsive form grid: one column on mobile and two columns on wider screens.
classes.usage: Use for grouped field layouts.

classes.name: axo-badge
classes.description: Compact inline status or metadata label with neutral structure.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-badge-dot or user-defined colors.

classes.name: axo-badge-dot
classes.description: Current-color status dot sized for axo-badge.
classes.usage: Place inside axo-badge before its label.

classes.name: axo-alert
classes.description: Neutral alert or notice container with structured spacing and border.
classes.usage: Combine with axo-surface or custom status colors.

classes.name: axo-alert-title
classes.description: Strong title treatment for an Axoloth alert.
classes.usage: Use inside axo-alert.

classes.name: axo-empty
classes.description: Centered empty-state layout for icon, title, description, and actions.
classes.usage: Use axo-empty-state as a descriptive alias.

classes.name: axo-empty-state
classes.description: Descriptive alias for the centered axo-empty layout.
classes.usage: Use with axo-empty-icon, axo-empty-title, and axo-empty-description.

classes.name: axo-empty-icon
classes.description: Centered circular icon slot for an empty state.
classes.usage: Place inside axo-empty or axo-empty-state.

classes.name: axo-empty-title
classes.description: Title typography for an empty state.
classes.usage: Place inside axo-empty or axo-empty-state.

classes.name: axo-empty-description
classes.description: Readable muted description for an empty state.
classes.usage: Place inside axo-empty or axo-empty-state.

classes.name: axo-table-wrap
classes.description: Responsive table wrapper with horizontal overflow safety.
classes.usage: Wrap an axo-table so narrow viewports can scroll it.

classes.name: axo-table
classes.description: Neutral full-width data table with consistent cell structure.
classes.usage: Use on a semantic table inside axo-table-wrap.

classes.name: axo-table-compact
classes.description: Compact cell-density preset for axo-table.
classes.usage: Use on the same element as axo-table.

classes.name: axo-table-sticky
classes.description: Keeps table header cells visible inside a scrolling table wrapper.
classes.usage: Use on the same element as axo-table.

classes.name: axo-visually-hidden
classes.description: Visually hides content while keeping it available to assistive technology.
classes.usage: Use for accessible labels or descriptions that should not be visible.

classes.name: axo-skip-link
classes.description: Keyboard skip link that becomes visible when focused.
classes.usage: Place as the first focusable link and point it to the main content id.

classes.name: axo-divider
classes.description: Neutral full-width divider with configurable thickness, spacing, and opacity.
classes.usage: Use on hr or a decorative separator.

classes.name: axo-progress
classes.description: Accessible progress track wrapper for a child axo-progress-bar.
classes.usage: Add progressbar ARIA attributes and set --axo-progress-value.

classes.name: axo-progress-bar
classes.description: Progress fill controlled by --axo-progress-value.
classes.usage: Place as the direct child of axo-progress.

classes.name: axo-progress-indeterminate
classes.description: Looping indeterminate state for axo-progress with reduced-motion support.
classes.usage: Use with axo-progress when completion percentage is unknown.

classes.name: axo-skeleton
classes.description: Neutral loading placeholder with a reduced-motion-safe pulse.
classes.usage: Mark decorative skeletons aria-hidden and customize their dimensions.

classes.name: axo-skeleton-text
classes.description: Text-line width preset for axo-skeleton.
classes.usage: Use on the same element as axo-skeleton.

classes.name: axo-skeleton-circle
classes.description: Circular avatar-style preset for axo-skeleton.
classes.usage: Use on the same element as axo-skeleton.

classes.name: axo-help
classes.description: Muted helper text for a form field.
classes.usage: Connect to its control with aria-describedby when it adds instructions.

classes.name: axo-error
classes.description: Readable validation error text with configurable error color.
classes.usage: Connect to the invalid control with aria-describedby.

classes.name: axo-required
classes.description: Adds a visual required marker after label text.
classes.usage: Still add the native required attribute to the associated control.

classes.name: axo-invalid
classes.description: Validation border and ring for an invalid axo-input.
classes.usage: Use with aria-invalid=true and an associated axo-error message.

classes.name: axo-checkbox
classes.description: Aligned label layout for a native checkbox and its text.
classes.usage: Use on a label containing input type checkbox.

classes.name: axo-radio
classes.description: Aligned label layout for a native radio and its text.
classes.usage: Use on a label containing input type radio.

classes.name: axo-switch
classes.description: Accessible switch layout built from a native checkbox.
classes.usage: Use on a label whose direct child is input type checkbox.

classes.name: axo-fade
classes.description: Fade-in entrance animation.
classes.usage: Customize timing with --axo-duration and --axo-delay.

classes.name: axo-rise
classes.description: Fade and move upward into place.
classes.usage: Customize distance with --axo-rise-distance.

classes.name: axo-pop
classes.description: Fade and scale into place.
classes.usage: Customize start scale with --axo-pop-start.

classes.name: axo-lift
classes.description: Lift upward on hover.
classes.usage: Customize distance with --axo-lift-distance.

classes.name: axo-glow
classes.description: Soft hover glow shadow.
classes.usage: Customize shadow with --axo-glow-shadow.

classes.name: axo-shimmer
classes.description: Looping shimmer overlay.
classes.usage: Customize with --axo-shimmer-duration and --axo-shimmer-color.

classes.name: axo-theme-light
classes.description: Light theme marker for Axoloth surface variables.
classes.usage: Use on a parent wrapper.

classes.name: axo-theme-dark
classes.description: Dark theme marker for Axoloth surface variables.
classes.usage: Use on a parent wrapper.

classes.name: axo-surface
classes.description: Normal surface for the current theme marker.
classes.usage: Use with axo-card or another structural element.

classes.name: axo-contrast
classes.description: Inverted contrast surface for the current theme marker.
classes.usage: Use with axo-card when the card should stand out from the parent theme.

variables.name: --axo-gap
variables.description: Gap between items inside an Axoloth bento grid.

variables.name: --axo-row-min
variables.description: Minimum auto row height for the bento grid.

variables.name: --axo-radius
variables.description: Default border radius for Axoloth cards.

variables.name: --axo-border
variables.description: Default border value for Axoloth cards.

valueSuggestions.description: Subtle dark border for light surfaces.

variables.name: --axo-card-padding
variables.description: Default padding for Axoloth cards.

variables.name: --axo-stack-gap
variables.description: Gap between children inside axo-stack.

variables.name: --axo-row-gap
variables.description: Gap between children inside axo-row.

variables.name: --axo-header-height
variables.description: Minimum block size for Axoloth header/appbar layouts.

variables.name: --axo-header-gap
variables.description: Gap between top-level header grid/flex areas.

variables.name: --axo-header-center-width
variables.description: Preferred max width for the center slot of axo-header-grid.

variables.description: Gap between links or items inside axo-header-nav.

variables.description: Vertical padding for Axoloth header layouts.

variables.description: Horizontal padding for Axoloth header layouts.

variables.name: --axo-header-slot-gap
variables.description: Gap between children inside header slots.

variables.description: Preferred width for axo-searchbar.

variables.name: --axo-searchbar-padding-inline

variables.description: Inline size and minimum inline size for axo-icon-button.

variables.description: Hover lift distance for axo-icon-button.

variables.description: Inner padding for axo-sidebar.

variables.description: Transition timing used by sidebar width and item interactions.

variables.description: Bottom viewport inset for an off-canvas sidebar.

variables.description: Backdrop color behind an open off-canvas sidebar.

variables.description: Open and close transition duration for the drawer and backdrop.

variables.description: Timing function for drawer and backdrop transitions.

variables.description: Stacking level for the off-canvas sidebar.

variables.description: Bottom viewport inset for axo-drawer.

variables.name: --axo-drawer-backdrop

variables.description: Vertical distance used while the dialog enters.

variables.description: Border radius for dropdown menus and items.

variables.description: Border applied to a dropdown menu.

variables.description: Stacking level for dropdown menus.

variables.description: Open and close transition duration for dropdown menus.

variables.name: --axo-dropdown-item-padding

variables.name: --axo-sidebar-fixed-top
variables.description: Top inset for axo-sidebar-fixed.

valueSuggestions.description: Pin to the viewport top edge.
Offset below a compact app header.
Offset below a default app header.
Offset below a large app header.

variables.description: Bottom inset for axo-sidebar-fixed.

valueSuggestions.description: Pin to the viewport bottom edge.

variables.description: Logical end offset used by fixed sidebar main-content helpers.

variables.description: Inline edge padding and scroll padding for axo-reel.

variables.name: --axo-flow-space
variables.description: Vertical rhythm between direct children of axo-flow.

variables.name: --axo-split-gap
variables.description: Gap between the two regions inside axo-split.

variables.description: Preferred minimum width of each axo-split region before wrapping.

variables.name: --axo-split-leading-grow
variables.description: Flex grow ratio for the first direct child of axo-split.

variables.name: --axo-split-trailing-grow
variables.description: Flex grow ratio for the final direct child of axo-split.

variables.name: --axo-split-align
variables.description: Cross-axis alignment for direct children of axo-split.

valueSuggestions.description: Align regions to the block start.
Center regions on the cross axis.
Align regions to the block end.

variables.name: --axo-sidebar-layout-width
variables.description: Preferred width of the first region in axo-sidebar-layout.

variables.description: Minimum share required by the main region before axo-sidebar-layout wraps.

variables.name: --axo-sidebar-layout-align
variables.description: Cross-axis alignment for regions inside axo-sidebar-layout.

valueSuggestions.description: Align regions to the block start.
Center regions on the cross axis.
Align regions to the block end.

variables.name: --axo-frame-ratio
variables.description: Aspect ratio maintained by axo-frame.

variables.name: --axo-frame-fit
variables.description: Object fitting mode for media inside axo-frame.

valueSuggestions.description: Fit all media inside the frame.
Stretch media to fill the frame.
Use the smaller contain or natural size.

variables.name: --axo-frame-position
variables.description: Object position for media inside axo-frame.

variables.name: --axo-pile-align
variables.description: Block-axis alignment for overlaid children inside axo-pile.

valueSuggestions.description: Stretch overlays to the pile height.
Align overlays to the block start.
Align overlays to the block end.

variables.name: --axo-pile-justify
variables.description: Inline-axis alignment for overlaid children inside axo-pile.

valueSuggestions.description: Stretch overlays to the pile width.
